# Alex Leung

> San Francisco software engineer writing about AI product development, software systems, deep learning notes, and small browser experiments. Licensed Professional Engineer (P.Eng.).

## Background

Alex Leung's software work has spanned embedded systems, distributed systems, AI product development, and full-stack product engineering. He has worked across home electrification, AR/AI hardware, and consumer product engineering, and writes about software systems, AI tools, deep learning notes, and browser experiments.

He holds a Master of Science in Electrical and Computer Engineering from Georgia Institute of Technology and a Bachelor of Applied Science in Electrical Engineering from the University of Waterloo.

He is a licensed Professional Engineer (P.Eng.) through Professional Engineers Ontario (PEO).

## Topics This Site Covers

- Software Engineering
- AI-Assisted Software Development and Tools
- AI-Assisted Software Workflows
- Distributed Systems and Backend Reliability
- Full-Stack Product Engineering
- Systems Design
- Embedded Systems
